name: Vinaigrette of Braised Soup Veggies
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the carrot lengthwise and trim off the top 2 inches of celery. Quarter the remaining head.
2. Remove the green part of leeks. Slice the turnip into 3/8-inch slabs.
3. Place the vegetables, minced garlic, and ground coriander in a saucepan large enough to handle them comfortably. Add water and salt. Cover and place over high heat.
4. Cook until the vegetables are soft. Remove each vegetable from the water as they are done and drain on towels.
5. Place the vegetables in the refrigerator to chill.
6. Add white wine vinegar to the liquid in the saucepan and boil the liquid until reduced by 2/3.
7. Remove from heat and pour the liquid into a mixing bowl.
8. When the liquid is cool, add chopped fresh dill and vigorously beat in the extra virgin olive oil.
9. Arrange the vegetables on a platter and pour the sauce over them. Serve.
